name: Northside Independent School District
about: Northside Independent School District is the largest school district in San Antonio and the fourth largest in Texas, serving approximately 103,000 students.
calendarNotes: Northside ISD, one of the largest school districts in Texas, serves the north and northwest sides of the San Antonio metro area. The school year starts in early August and Spring Break falls in mid-March, generally aligned with other Bexar County districts including San Antonio ISD and Alamo Heights ISD. Families coordinating between NISD and adjacent districts should verify exact dates, as they can differ by a day or two. San Antonio's March weather is typically warm and pleasant — an attractive time for local family outings to the River Walk, Six Flags Fiesta Texas, or the Texas Hill Country. The district's large geographic footprint means transportation logistics and extracurricular scheduling vary significantly by school.
